_comment: Sidecar for testdata/fixtures/multi-object.glb — node name -> Linkage key. Stands in for the real Properties70-parsed Linkage key until Phase 4's worker exists (see CLAUDE.md invariant #3). Only Pump-1 has an entry on purpose: it exercises LinkageMetadataPlugin's full-join tier, while Pump-2/Valve-1/Tank-1 exercise the fuzzy-match and geometry-only degradation tiers.
